shortDescription.default: Display upcoming holidays and birthdays from a SharePoint list with support for annual recurrence and moving holidays

longDescription.default: Synozur Holidays and Birthdays is a SharePoint Framework web part that displays upcoming holidays and birthdays from a SharePoint list. The web part features automatic list provisioning, support for annual recurrence (birthdays and fixed-date holidays), complex recurrence rules for moving holidays (e.g., Labor Day), and flexible display options with expandable views (30-day default, 365-day expanded). Events are grouped by month and can include images and type badges for enhanced visibility. For support, contact us at contactus@synozur.com.
